name: {{PREFIX}} AegisOps Analyze Latency Regressed
message: AegisOps incident analysis latency exceeded 3000 ms. Review provider saturation, screenshot payload size, and replay drift before escalating.

name: {{PREFIX}} AegisOps Analyze Route Errors
message: AegisOps recorded more than three analyze-route errors in the last 10 minutes. Inspect the operator handoff path and recent provider failures.

name: {{PREFIX}} AegisOps Sev1 Detection
message: AegisOps observed a SEV1-class incident. Open the incident command board and confirm the follow-up and export path are ready for handoff.
